notes: Align contact fields with catalog audit: Sources host on ÓKK, email domains for Hard Rock and Doboz.
missingOrUncertain: prov-cov-hard-rock-vaci: Public site uses web reservations; budapest@hardrock.com is corporate — email cleared.
prov-doboz-erzsebetvaros: Official inbox is info@doboz.pm (PM domain); kept in longDescription only.

patch.longDescription:
Óbudai Kulturális Központ (Óbuda Cultural Centre) at San Marco utca 81 programmes theatre, music, and family events across Óbuda and partner houses. Tickets via kulturkozpont.hu; office phone (06-1) 388-7370 on weekdays 9:00–17:00.

Sources: https://kulturkozpont.hu/
